etymology.description: 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") + 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") = multiple mouths producing sound -> phonetic
etymology.interpretation: The character 吅(xuān, "sound; phonetic") combines two 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") to symbolize the idea of multiple mouths or repeated speech, indicating sound or phonetic elements.
